Critesion santacrucense is a wild grass species. Research suggests that Critesion spp., such as Hordeum spp., have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include saponins, flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Critesion spp. include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions.
